claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Implemented and deployed DinoBrain v2.0.1 stability fixes based on the QA review. Patched fail-closed Codex hook duplicate-lock behavior, added Claude Code UserPromptSubmit hook registration and verification, expanded v2 action gates to the full OS tool contract, made behavior eval strict when golden cases are missing, added source chunk redaction/truncation guards, made node lifecycle apply real archive/hold/merge/provenance repair operations, handled os_begin_task context-pack failures as fail-closed task/gate records, fixed Observatory JSON graph fallback for v2 indexes, bumped app/installer version to 2.0.1, added regression coverage, pushed main and tag v2.0.1. Local release ZIP was built; direct GitHub Release upload could not run because no GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN is available in this shell.
